Annuaire Santé - version de développement local (intégration continue v1.2.0-snapshot-2) construite par les outils de publication FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard). Voir le répertoire des versions publiées

  • Contenu
  • Descriptions détaillées
  • Mises en correspondance
  • Exemples
  • XML
  • JSON
  • TTL

Profil de ressource: AS Donnée Publique Organization Profile

URL officielle: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-dp-organization Version: 1.2.0-snapshot-2
Draft à partir de 2026-06-30 Nom computable: AsDpOrganizationProfile

Profil public applicatif créé à partir du profil générique as-organization dans le contexte des données en libre accès de l’Annuaire Santé. Pour connaître les paramètres de recherches associés à ce profil, il suffit de consulter le CapabilityStatement AsServerCapabilityStatement.

Utilisations:

  • Exemples pour ce/t/te Profil: CH EURE-SEINE, PHARMACIE NOLOT and CABINET SAINT ANTOINE
  • CapabilityStatements utilisant ce Profil: CapabilityStatement[https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/CapabilityStatement/AsServerDPCapabilityStatement|1.2.0-snapshot-2]

Vous pouvez également vérifier les usages dans le FHIR IG Statistics

Vues formelles du contenu du profil

Description des profils, des différentiels, des instantanés et de leurs représentations.

  • Tableau des éléments clés
  • Tableau différentiel (differential)
  • Tableau récapitulatif (snapshot)
  • Statistiques/Références
  • Tous

Obligations
Organization C 0..* AsOrganizationProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) A grouping of people or organizations with a common purpose

Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url

value[x] 1..1 Period Value of extension

extension:closureReason 0..1 Annotation Additional notes that apply to this resource or element.
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/note
Constraints: ext-1

URL: https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-organization-member
Constraints: ext-1

URL: https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-organization-raison-sociale
Constraints: ext-1

URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-organization-pharmacy-licence
Constraints: ext-1

URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-organization-pricing-model
Binding: JDV_J259_ModeFixationTarifaire_RASS (20251222120000) (required)
Constraints: ext-1
extension:as-ext-organization-closing-type S 0..1 CodeableConcept Type de fermeture de la structure (typeFermeture).
URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-organization-closing-type
Binding: JDV_J260_TypeFermeture_RASS (20240927120000) (required)
Constraints: ext-1
extension:as-ext-organization-budget-type S 0..1 string Nature du budget alloué à la structure (natureEtablissement).
URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-organization-budget-type
Constraints: ext-1

URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-organization-authorization-deadline
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
Constraints: ext-1
Slices pour identifier ΣC 0..* Identifier Identifies this organization across multiple systems
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par pattern:system, pattern:type
identifier:Toutes les slices Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
use ?!Σ 0..1 code usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required)
identifier:idNatSt SΣC 0..* Identifier Identifiant national de structure, à privilégier. L'idNatSt ne doit pas être construit, il peut être trouvé via l'API Annuaire Santé.
use ?!Σ 1..1 code usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required)
Motif requis: official
type Σ 1..1 CodeableConcept Description of identifier
Binding: FRCoreValueSetOrganizationIdentifierType (2.2.0) (extensible)
Motif requis: Au moins les éléments suivants
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Valeur fixe : (Complexe)

extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system

version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Valeur fixe : IDNST
display 0..1 string Representation defined by the system
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
system Σ 1..1 uri The namespace for the identifier value
Motif requis: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.71.4.2.2
value Σ 1..1 string Identifiant national de la structure. Cet identifiant ne doit pas être construit ni interprété, la donnée peut être trouvée dans l'annuaire santé.
Exemple General: 123456

Slices pour telecom C 0..* FRCoreContactPointProfile(2.2.0) Différentes instances pour les téléphones, la télécopie et l’adresse mail.
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:system, exists:extension('https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-contact-point-email-type')
Constraints: org-3
telecom:Toutes les slices Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:emailType 0..1 Coding Champs permettant de préciser le type d'email (MSSANTE | APICRYPT | OSM | AutreMessagerie) dont il est question dans le cas où le point de contact est un email.
URL: https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-contact-point-email-type
Binding: FRCoreValueSetEmailType (2.2.0) (extensible)
Constraints: ext-1
system ΣC 1..1 code phone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.
value Σ 1..1 string The actual contact point details
use ?!Σ 0..1 code home | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.
telecom:mailbox-mss SC 0..* AsMailboxMSSProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Les BALs MSS de type ORG ou APP rattachées à une personne morale responsable de l’accès et de l’usage de la BAL (boiteLettreMSS).
Constraints: org-3

Contraintes

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Organization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Organization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Organization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Organization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique Organization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()

must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error Organization.meta.extension:as-ext-data-trace, Organization.extension:shortName, Organization.extension:description, Organization.extension:usePeriod, Organization.extension:openReason, Organization.extension:closureReason, Organization.extension:member, Organization.extension:sae, Organization.extension:raisonSociale, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-pharmacy-licence, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-pricing-model, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-closing-type, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-budget-type, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-authorization-deadline, Organization.modifierExtension, Organization.type:organizationType.extension, Organization.type:organizationType.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.type:secteurActiviteRASS.extension, Organization.type:secteurActiviteRASS.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.type:statutJuridiqueINSEE.extension, Organization.type:statutJuridiqueINSEE.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.type:sphParticipation.extension, Organization.type:sphParticipation.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.type:typeEtablissement.extension, Organization.type:typeEtablissement.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.telecom.extension:emailType, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:emailType, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata.extension:type, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata.extension:description, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata.extension:service, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata.extension:listeRouge, Organization.contact.modifierExtension Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
org-1 error Organization The organization SHALL at least have a name or an identifier, and possibly more than one (identifier.count() + name.count()) > 0
org-2 error Organization.address An address of an organization can never be of use 'home' where(use = 'home').empty()
org-3 error Organization.telecom, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss The telecom of an organization can never be of use 'home' where(use = 'home').empty()

Cette structure est dérivée de AsOrganizationProfile

NomDrapeauxCard.TypeDescription et contraintes    Filter:
Bindings
Contraintes
Obligations
Organization 0..* AsOrganizationProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) A grouping of people or organizations with a common purpose
meta
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:as-ext-data-trace S 0..1 (Complexe) DataTrace : Informe sur l'origine de la donnée (Autorité d'Enregistrement (AE) et Système d'Information (SI).
URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-data-trace
source 0..1 uri Identifies where the resource comes from
Motif requis: https://annuaire.esante.gouv.fr
profile 2..* canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
Slices pour profile Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
profile:fr-canonical 1..1 canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
profile:as-dp-canonical 1..1 canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
Motif requis: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-dp-organization|1.2.0-snapshot-2
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:as-ext-digital-certificate S 0..0 AS Digital Certificate Extension
extension:as-ext-organization-pharmacy-licence S 0..* AsOrganizationPharmacyLicenceExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Numéro de la licence d'exploitation d’une officine (numeroLicence).
extension:as-ext-organization-pricing-model S 0..1 AsOrganizationPricingModelExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Mode de tarification de la structure (modeFixationTarif).
extension:as-ext-organization-closing-type S 0..1 AsOrganizationClosingTypeExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Type de fermeture de la structure (typeFermeture).
extension:as-ext-organization-budget-type S 0..1 AsOrganizationBudgetTypeExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Nature du budget alloué à la structure (natureEtablissement).
extension:as-ext-organization-authorization-deadline S 0..1 AsOrganizationAuthorizationDeadlineExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) AS Organization Authorization Deadline Extension
identifier 0..* Identifier Identifies this organization across multiple systems
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
Slices pour identifier Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
identifier:idNatSt S 0..* Identifier Identifiant national de structure, à privilégier. L'idNatSt ne doit pas être construit, il peut être trouvé via l'API Annuaire Santé.
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
identifier:siren S 0..* Identifier Identifiant SIREN (9 chiffres)
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
identifier:siret S 0..* Identifier Identifiant SIRET (14 chiffres)
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
identifier:finess S 0..* Identifier Identifiant FINESS Entité Géographique (EG) ou Entité Juridique (EJ)
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
identifier:rppsRang S 0..* Identifier RPPS rang (11 chiffres RPPS + 2 ou 3 chiffres RANG)
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
active S 1..1 boolean La ressource est-elle active ? (active | inactive). true par défaut; false pour les structures supprimées.
Slices pour type Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
type:organizationType S 0..1 CodeableConcept Type de structure Entité Juridique : LEGAL-ENTITY; Entité Géographique : GEOGRAPHICAL-ENTITY
type:secteurActiviteRASS S 0..1 CodeableConcept Secteurs d'activité des établissements avec la même activité dans le RASS
type:categorieEtablissementRASS S 0..1 CodeableConcept Catégorie d'établissement du RASS
type:statutJuridiqueINSEE S 0..1 CodeableConcept Statut juridique FINESS qui caractérise la situation juridique de la personne morale (Synonyme : statutJuridiqueINSEE).
type:sphParticipation S 0..1 CodeableConcept Modalités de participation au service public hospitalier (Synonyme : modaliteParticipationSPH).
type:typeEtablissement S 0..1 CodeableConcept Le type d’établissement détermine si c'est un établissement principal ou secondaire.
alias S 0..* string Enseigne commerciale de la structure (Synonyme : complementRaisonSociale).
telecom 0..* FRCoreContactPointProfile(2.2.0) Différentes instances pour les téléphones, la télécopie et l’adresse mail.
period 0..0 Time period when the contact point was/is in use
Slices pour telecom Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
telecom:mailbox-mss S 0..* AsMailboxMSSProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Les BALs MSS de type ORG ou APP rattachées à une personne morale responsable de l’accès et de l’usage de la BAL (boiteLettreMSS).
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata 0..1 AsMailboxMSSMetadataExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) AS Mailbox Metadata
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:responsible 0..0 Extension
period 0..0 Time period when the contact point was/is in use
address S 0..* AsAddressExtendedProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) adresseEJ : Adresse géopostale de l'entité juridique ou adresseEG : Adresse(s) géopostale(s) de l'entité géographique.
contact 0..0 Contact for the organization for a certain purpose
endpoint S 0..0 Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the organization

Documentation pour ce format
NomDrapeauxCard.TypeDescription et contraintes    Filter:
Bindings
Contraintes
Obligations
Organization C 0..* AsOrganizationProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) A grouping of people or organizations with a common purpose

id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource

Slices pour extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url

URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-data-trace
Constraints: ext-1

lastUpdated Σ 0..1 instant When the resource version last changed
source Σ 0..1 uri Identifies where the resource comes from
Motif requis: https://annuaire.esante.gouv.fr
Slices pour profile Σ 2..* canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:$this
profile:fr-canonical Σ 1..1 canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to

Motif requis: https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-organization|2.2.0
profile:as-dp-canonical Σ 1..1 canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to

security Σ 0..* Coding Security Labels applied to this resource
Binding: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.
tag Σ 0..* Coding Tags applied to this resource
Binding: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Bindings AdditionnelsBut
AllLanguages Binding Max
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources

Constraints: ext-1

extension:closureReason 0..1 Annotation Additional notes that apply to this resource or element.

text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
system Σ 1..1 uri The namespace for the identifier value
Motif requis: https://rppsrang.esante.gouv.fr
value Σ 0..1 string The value that is unique
Exemple General: 123456
active ?!SΣ 1..1 boolean La ressource est-elle active ? (active | inactive). true par défaut; false pour les structures supprimées.
Slices pour type Σ 0..* CodeableConcept Kind of organization
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:$this
Binding: FRCoreValueSetOrganizationEtablissementType (2.2.0) (example)
type:organizationType SΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Type de structure Entité Juridique : LEGAL-ENTITY; Entité Géographique : GEOGRAPHICAL-ENTITY

extension:emailType 0..1 Coding Champs permettant de préciser le type d'email (MSSANTE | APICRYPT | OSM | AutreMessagerie) dont il est question dans le cas où le point de contact est un email.
URL: https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-contact-point-email-type
Binding: FRCoreValueSetEmailType (2.2.0) (extensible)
Constraints: ext-1
system ΣC 1..1 code phone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.
value Σ 1..1 string The actual contact point details
use ?!Σ 0..1 code home | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.
rank Σ 0..1 positiveInt Specify preferred order of use (1 = highest)
telecom:mailbox-mss SC 0..* AsMailboxMSSProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Les BALs MSS de type ORG ou APP rattachées à une personne morale responsable de l’accès et de l’usage de la BAL (boiteLettreMSS).

id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing

value[x] 0..1 boolean Value of extension
url 1..1 uri "https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss-metadata"
system ΣC 1..1 code phone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.
Motif requis: email
value SΣ 1..1 string Boîte Aux Lettres (BAL) MSS
use ?!Σ 0..1 code home | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.
rank Σ 0..1 positiveInt Specify preferred order of use (1 = highest)
address SC 0..* AsAddressExtendedProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) adresseEJ : Adresse géopostale de l'entité juridique ou adresseEG : Adresse(s) géopostale(s) de l'entité géographique.
Constraints: org-2
partOf Σ 0..1 Reference(FR Core Organization Profile(2.2.0) | AS Organization Profile(1.2.0-snapshot-2)) Référence vers la structure de rattachement (lien EG/ EJ). Chaque entité geographique et ratachée à une entité juridique. C'est l'id de la ressource de l'entité juridique à laquelle est ratachée la structure qui est remontée dans l'element de référence partOf de l'entité géographique.
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
reference ΣC 0..1 string Literal reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type Σ 0..1 uri Type the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Binding: FRCoreValueSetOrganizationType (2.2.0) (extensible)
identifier Σ 0..1 Identifier Logical reference, when literal reference is not known
display Σ 0..1 string Text alternative for the resource

Contraintes

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Organization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Organization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Organization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Organization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique Organization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()

Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.system, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.value, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.use, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.rank, Organization.address, Organization.partOf, Organization.partOf.extension, Organization.partOf.reference, Organization.partOf.type, Organization.partOf.identifier, Organization.partOf.display, Organization.contact.extension, Organization.contact.modifierExtension, Organization.contact.purpose, Organization.contact.name, Organization.contact.telecom, Organization.contact.address All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error Organization.meta.extension, Organization.meta.extension:as-ext-data-trace, Organization.extension, Organization.extension:shortName, Organization.extension:description, Organization.extension:usePeriod, Organization.extension:usePeriod.value[x].extension, Organization.extension:openReason, Organization.extension:closureReason, Organization.extension:member, Organization.extension:sae, Organization.extension:raisonSociale, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-pharmacy-licence, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-pricing-model, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-closing-type, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-budget-type, Organization.extension:as-ext-organization-authorization-deadline, Organization.modifierExtension, Organization.identifier.extension, Organization.identifier:idNatSt.extension, Organization.identifier:siren.extension, Organization.identifier:siret.extension, Organization.identifier:finess.extension, Organization.identifier:finess.type.extension, Organization.identifier:finess.type.coding.extension, Organization.identifier:rppsRang.extension, Organization.type:organizationType.extension, Organization.type:organizationType.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.type:organizationType.coding.extension, Organization.type:secteurActiviteRASS.extension, Organization.type:secteurActiviteRASS.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.type:secteurActiviteRASS.coding.extension, Organization.type:categorieEtablissementRASS.extension, Organization.type:categorieEtablissementRASS.coding.extension, Organization.type:statutJuridiqueINSEE.extension, Organization.type:statutJuridiqueINSEE.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.type:sphParticipation.extension, Organization.type:sphParticipation.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.type:typeEtablissement.extension, Organization.type:typeEtablissement.extension:as-ext-organization-types, Organization.telecom.extension, Organization.telecom.extension:emailType, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:emailType, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata.extension, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata.extension:type, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata.extension:description, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata.extension:service, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata.extension:listeRouge, Organization.partOf.extension, Organization.contact.extension, Organization.contact.modifierExtension Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
org-1 error Organization The organization SHALL at least have a name or an identifier, and possibly more than one (identifier.count() + name.count()) > 0
org-2 error Organization.address An address of an organization can never be of use 'home' where(use = 'home').empty()
org-3 error Organization.telecom, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss The telecom of an organization can never be of use 'home' where(use = 'home').empty()

Cette structure est dérivée de AsOrganizationProfile

Résumé

Obligatoire : 1 élément(2 éléments obligatoire(s) imbriqué(s))
Must-Support : 23 éléments
Interdit : 18 éléments

Extensions

Cette structure fait référence à ces extensions:

  • https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-data-trace|1.2.0-snapshot-2

Contraintes
Obligations
Organization C 0..* AsOrganizationProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) A grouping of people or organizations with a common purpose

Slices pour identifier ΣC 0..* Identifier Identifies this organization across multiple systems
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par pattern:system, pattern:type
identifier:Toutes les slices Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
use ?!Σ 0..1 code usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required)
identifier:idNatSt SΣC 0..* Identifier Identifiant national de structure, à privilégier. L'idNatSt ne doit pas être construit, il peut être trouvé via l'API Annuaire Santé.
use ?!Σ 1..1 code usual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required)
Motif requis: official
type Σ 1..1 CodeableConcept Description of identifier
Binding: FRCoreValueSetOrganizationIdentifierType (2.2.0) (extensible)
Motif requis: Au moins les éléments suivants
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Valeur fixe : (Complexe)

extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Valeur fixe : https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/CodeSystem/fr-core-cs-v2-0203

Valeur fixe : IDNST

userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
system Σ 1..1 uri The namespace for the identifier value
Motif requis: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.71.4.2.2
value Σ 1..1 string Identifiant national de la structure. Cet identifiant ne doit pas être construit ni interprété, la donnée peut être trouvée dans l'annuaire santé.
Exemple General: 123456

extension:emailType 0..1 Coding Champs permettant de préciser le type d'email (MSSANTE | APICRYPT | OSM | AutreMessagerie) dont il est question dans le cas où le point de contact est un email.
URL: https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-contact-point-email-type
Binding: FRCoreValueSetEmailType (2.2.0) (extensible)
Constraints: ext-1
system ΣC 1..1 code phone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.
value Σ 1..1 string The actual contact point details
use ?!Σ 0..1 code home | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.
telecom:mailbox-mss SC 0..* AsMailboxMSSProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Les BALs MSS de type ORG ou APP rattachées à une personne morale responsable de l’accès et de l’usage de la BAL (boiteLettreMSS).

Bindings terminologiques

Chemin Statut Usage Jeu de valeurs (ValueSet) Version Source

Organization.identifier:siret.​use Base required IdentifierUse 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
Organization.identifier:siret.​type Base extensible FR Core ValueSet Organization identifier type 📍2.2.0 Guide d'implémentation FR Core v2.2
Organization.identifier:finess.​use Base required IdentifierUse 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
Organization.identifier:rppsRang.​use Base required IdentifierUse 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR

Organization.type Base example FR Core ValueSet Organization Etablisement type 📍2.2.0 Guide d'implémentation FR Core v2.2
Organization.type:organizationType Base required FR Core ValueSet Organization type 📍2.2.0 Guide d'implémentation FR Core v2.2
Organization.type:organizationType.​extension:as-ext-organization-types.​value[x] Base required AS ValueSet OrganizationTypes 📍1.2.0-snapshot-2 cet IG
Organization.type:secteurActiviteRASS Base required JDV_J101_SecteurActivite_RASS 📍20260223120000 Terminologies de Santé v1.10
Organization.type:secteurActiviteRASS.​extension:as-ext-organization-types.​value[x] Base required AS ValueSet OrganizationTypes 📍1.2.0-snapshot-2 cet IG
Organization.type:categorieEtablissementRASS Base required JDV_J129_CategorieEtablissement_RASS 📍20260223120000 Terminologies de Santé v1.10
Organization.type:statutJuridiqueINSEE Base required JDV_J100_FinessStatutJuridique_RASS 📍20200424120000 Terminologies de Santé v1.10
Organization.type:statutJuridiqueINSEE.​extension:as-ext-organization-types.​value[x] Base required AS ValueSet OrganizationTypes 📍1.2.0-snapshot-2 cet IG
Organization.type:sphParticipation Base required JDV_J162_ESPIC_RASS 📍20210528120000 Terminologies de Santé v1.10
Organization.type:sphParticipation.​extension:as-ext-organization-types.​value[x] Base required AS ValueSet OrganizationTypes 📍1.2.0-snapshot-2 cet IG
Organization.type:typeEtablissement Base required AS ValueSet type Etablissement 📍1.2.0-snapshot-2 cet IG
Organization.type:typeEtablissement.​extension:as-ext-organization-types.​value[x] Base required AS ValueSet OrganizationTypes 📍1.2.0-snapshot-2 cet IG
Organization.telecom.​system Base required ContactPointSystem 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
Organization.telecom.​use Base required ContactPointUse 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.​extension:emailType.​value[x] Base extensible FR Core ValueSet Email type 📍2.2.0 Guide d'implémentation FR Core v2.2
Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.​system Base required ContactPointSystem 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss.​use Base required ContactPointUse 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR

Contraintes

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Organization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Organization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Organization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Organization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique Organization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()

org-1 error Organization The organization SHALL at least have a name or an identifier, and possibly more than one (identifier.count() + name.count()) > 0
org-2 error Organization.address An address of an organization can never be of use 'home' where(use = 'home').empty()
org-3 error Organization.telecom, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss The telecom of an organization can never be of use 'home' where(use = 'home').empty()

Vue différentielle

Cette structure est dérivée de AsOrganizationProfile

NomDrapeauxCard.TypeDescription et contraintes    Filter:
Bindings
Contraintes
Obligations
Organization 0..* AsOrganizationProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) A grouping of people or organizations with a common purpose
meta
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:as-ext-data-trace S 0..1 (Complexe) DataTrace : Informe sur l'origine de la donnée (Autorité d'Enregistrement (AE) et Système d'Information (SI).
URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-data-trace
source 0..1 uri Identifies where the resource comes from
Motif requis: https://annuaire.esante.gouv.fr
profile 2..* canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
Slices pour profile Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
profile:fr-canonical 1..1 canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
profile:as-dp-canonical 1..1 canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
Motif requis: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-dp-organization|1.2.0-snapshot-2
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:as-ext-digital-certificate S 0..0 AS Digital Certificate Extension
extension:as-ext-organization-pharmacy-licence S 0..* AsOrganizationPharmacyLicenceExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Numéro de la licence d'exploitation d’une officine (numeroLicence).
extension:as-ext-organization-pricing-model S 0..1 AsOrganizationPricingModelExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Mode de tarification de la structure (modeFixationTarif).
extension:as-ext-organization-closing-type S 0..1 AsOrganizationClosingTypeExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Type de fermeture de la structure (typeFermeture).
extension:as-ext-organization-budget-type S 0..1 AsOrganizationBudgetTypeExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Nature du budget alloué à la structure (natureEtablissement).
extension:as-ext-organization-authorization-deadline S 0..1 AsOrganizationAuthorizationDeadlineExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) AS Organization Authorization Deadline Extension
identifier 0..* Identifier Identifies this organization across multiple systems
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
Slices pour identifier Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
identifier:idNatSt S 0..* Identifier Identifiant national de structure, à privilégier. L'idNatSt ne doit pas être construit, il peut être trouvé via l'API Annuaire Santé.
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
identifier:siren S 0..* Identifier Identifiant SIREN (9 chiffres)
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
identifier:siret S 0..* Identifier Identifiant SIRET (14 chiffres)
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
identifier:finess S 0..* Identifier Identifiant FINESS Entité Géographique (EG) ou Entité Juridique (EJ)
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
identifier:rppsRang S 0..* Identifier RPPS rang (11 chiffres RPPS + 2 ou 3 chiffres RANG)
period 0..0 Time period when id is/was valid for use
assigner 0..0 Organization that issued id (may be just text)
active S 1..1 boolean La ressource est-elle active ? (active | inactive). true par défaut; false pour les structures supprimées.
Slices pour type Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
type:organizationType S 0..1 CodeableConcept Type de structure Entité Juridique : LEGAL-ENTITY; Entité Géographique : GEOGRAPHICAL-ENTITY
type:secteurActiviteRASS S 0..1 CodeableConcept Secteurs d'activité des établissements avec la même activité dans le RASS
type:categorieEtablissementRASS S 0..1 CodeableConcept Catégorie d'établissement du RASS
type:statutJuridiqueINSEE S 0..1 CodeableConcept Statut juridique FINESS qui caractérise la situation juridique de la personne morale (Synonyme : statutJuridiqueINSEE).
type:sphParticipation S 0..1 CodeableConcept Modalités de participation au service public hospitalier (Synonyme : modaliteParticipationSPH).
type:typeEtablissement S 0..1 CodeableConcept Le type d’établissement détermine si c'est un établissement principal ou secondaire.
alias S 0..* string Enseigne commerciale de la structure (Synonyme : complementRaisonSociale).
telecom 0..* FRCoreContactPointProfile(2.2.0) Différentes instances pour les téléphones, la télécopie et l’adresse mail.
period 0..0 Time period when the contact point was/is in use
Slices pour telecom Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
telecom:mailbox-mss S 0..* AsMailboxMSSProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) Les BALs MSS de type ORG ou APP rattachées à une personne morale responsable de l’accès et de l’usage de la BAL (boiteLettreMSS).
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:as-mailbox-mss-metadata 0..1 AsMailboxMSSMetadataExtension(1.2.0-snapshot-2) AS Mailbox Metadata
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:responsible 0..0 Extension
period 0..0 Time period when the contact point was/is in use
address S 0..* AsAddressExtendedProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) adresseEJ : Adresse géopostale de l'entité juridique ou adresseEG : Adresse(s) géopostale(s) de l'entité géographique.
contact 0..0 Contact for the organization for a certain purpose
endpoint S 0..0 Technical endpoints providing access to services operated for the organization

Bindings
Contraintes
Obligations
Organization C 0..* AsOrganizationProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) A grouping of people or organizations with a common purpose

id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource

Slices pour extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
extension:as-ext-data-trace S 0..1 (Complexe) DataTrace : Informe sur l'origine de la donnée (Autorité d'Enregistrement (AE) et Système d'Information (SI).
URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-data-trace

lastUpdated Σ 0..1 instant When the resource version last changed

Slices pour profile Σ 2..* canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:$this
profile:fr-canonical Σ 1..1 canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to

Motif requis: https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-organization|2.2.0
profile:as-dp-canonical Σ 1..1 canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to

security Σ 0..* Coding Security Labels applied to this resource
Binding: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.
tag Σ 0..* Coding Tags applied to this resource
Binding: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Bindings AdditionnelsBut
AllLanguages Binding Max
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources

Constraints: ext-1

extension:closureReason 0..1 Annotation Additional notes that apply to this resource or element.

extension:emailType 0..1 Coding Champs permettant de préciser le type d'email (MSSANTE | APICRYPT | OSM | AutreMessagerie) dont il est question dans le cas où le point de contact est un email.

rank Σ 0..1 positiveInt Specify preferred order of use (1 = highest)

system ΣC 1..1 code phone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.
Motif requis: email
value SΣ 1..1 string Boîte Aux Lettres (BAL) MSS
use ?!Σ 0..1 code home | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.
rank Σ 0..1 positiveInt Specify preferred order of use (1 = highest)
address SC 0..* AsAddressExtendedProfile(1.2.0-snapshot-2) adresseEJ : Adresse géopostale de l'entité juridique ou adresseEG : Adresse(s) géopostale(s) de l'entité géographique.
Constraints: org-2
partOf Σ 0..1 Reference(FR Core Organization Profile(2.2.0) | AS Organization Profile(1.2.0-snapshot-2)) Référence vers la structure de rattachement (lien EG/ EJ). Chaque entité geographique et ratachée à une entité juridique. C'est l'id de la ressource de l'entité juridique à laquelle est ratachée la structure qui est remontée dans l'element de référence partOf de l'entité géographique.
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
reference ΣC 0..1 string Literal reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type Σ 0..1 uri Type the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Binding: FRCoreValueSetOrganizationType (2.2.0) (extensible)
identifier Σ 0..1 Identifier Logical reference, when literal reference is not known
display Σ 0..1 string Text alternative for the resource

Contraintes

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Organization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Organization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Organization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Organization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique Organization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error Organization.meta, Organization.meta.extension, Organization.meta.extension:as-ext-data-trace, Organization.meta.versionId, Organization.meta.lastUpdated, Organization.meta.source, either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
org-1 error Organization The organization SHALL at least have a name or an identifier, and possibly more than one (identifier.count() + name.count()) > 0
org-2 error Organization.address An address of an organization can never be of use 'home' where(use = 'home').empty()
org-3 error Organization.telecom, Organization.telecom:mailbox-mss The telecom of an organization can never be of use 'home' where(use = 'home').empty()

Cette structure est dérivée de AsOrganizationProfile

Résumé

Obligatoire : 1 élément(2 éléments obligatoire(s) imbriqué(s))
Must-Support : 23 éléments
Interdit : 18 éléments

Extensions

Cette structure fait référence à ces extensions:

  • https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire/StructureDefinition/as-ext-data-trace|1.2.0-snapshot-2

 

Autres représentations du profil : CSV, Excel, Schematron
